inline_comments.message:
Opening braces should not be on a new line.
Max line length should be 120.

Code style should follow sonar rules (https://sonar.onap.org/coding_rules) and google code style (https://google.github.io/styleguide/javaguide.html) - with some changes: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Java+code+style

Have a matching log entry at the end of this method:
"Start: copy component instance"
"Finished: copy component instance"

It appears that you have used USER_DEFINED in the other code to represent a generic user defined error? If so, this appears incorrect as USER_ errors are errors about actual users in the system. 
You should replace usages of USER_DEFINED with actual existing or new specific errors, such as PROPERTY_NOT_FOUND, RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND, etc, and then remove USER_DEFINED. 
Also consider using GENERAL_ERROR.
Needs to be: log.error("error in destAdditionalInfo with dest component instance id:{}", destComponentInstanceId);
